name: Leader Capital Holdings Corp.
business: Leader Capital Holdings Corp. is an early stage technology company that provides a mobile application investment platform (FinMaster App) connecting investors with financial service providers. The platform offers real-time Taiwan stock quotes, financial news, AI stock selection, live broadcasts, and discussion forums. Through its subsidiaries, it also develops ecological-system applications, integrates big data, and promotes OTT applications.
sellsTo: financial service providers, especially trust companies and insurance companies

exposures.sentence: Through LFGL, we act as the service provider for a mobile application investment platform that is owned by JFB.
Key services include real-time Taiwan stock market quotes, financial industry information and news, social media activities, on-line live broadcast, A.I. stock selection and other features.

NPI, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries, LOC Weibo Co., Ltd. and Beijing DataComm Cloud Media Technology Co., Ltd., companies organized under the laws of the Republic of China and the laws of the People's Republic of China, respectively, engages primarily in the development of ecological-system applications, integration of big data and promotion of OTT applications.
